subcodes.first_line: O Candle of Nayriz! Be thou stirred with passion, shower forth sweetness and musk-fragrance, and like unto a brimming chalice, be thou the cause of joy and exhilaration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع نیریز شورانگیز شو و شکرریز و مشکبیز و مانند جام لبریز سبب نشئه و سرور
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
